title: All News
content:
All News

International Presentation by Dr. Tugba GULES at the World Trade Organization

Dr. Tugba GULES, Faculty Member at the Faculty of Law of our University, presented her academic paper titled “Beyond the Traditional: Exploring Non-Conventional Copyrights in the Modern Era” at an international scientific event held at the World Trade Organization (WTO) headquarters in Geneva.The study comprehensively examines the legal status of emerging forms of creative expression—such as AI-ge

Certificate In Islamic Economics And Finance

Certificate in Islamic Economics and Finance Program will start with the cooperation of İstanbul 29 Mayıs University and Al-Maktoum College for Higher Education. 
 
 
Program
Unit 1: Islamic Economics and Finance (24 Hours)
Unit Coordinator: Dr. Harun Sencal
UNIT SUMMARY
The unit will cover the origin, concepts, and aims of Islamic economics, including Islamic finance as practical tool

Vast Opportunities of Research

Istanbul 29 Mayıs University's academic staff and students benefit from all facilities and opportunities provided by the library of the Center for Islamic Studies, which is located at Bağlarbaşı Campus. The university library, on the other hand, currently holds over 70,000 books.
The library of the Center for Islamic Studies is one of the best libraries in Turkey. It holds thousands of books, sub

Opportunities of Study Abroad

English Preparatory: England Program
In the 2012-2013 academic year, the first 6 students who completed the English Preparatory School successfully and got a grade of 5.5 or above on the IELTS exam were sent to London for a 6-month language program.

Two International Publications from the Students of Department of Economics

In collaboration with Asst. Prof. Hakkı Kutay Bolkol and Asst. Prof. Ece H. Güleryüz, scientific studies titled “HUMAN DEVELOPMENT AND ECONOMIC GROWTH IN TURKEY AND CHINA: AN EMPIRICAL ANALYSIS OF THE CAUSAL RELATIONSHIP” by Süleyman İminov and “ENERGY CONSUMPTION, CO2 EMISSION AND GDP PER CAPITA IN THE UNITED STATES: AN INVESTIGATION OF THE CAUSAL RELATIONSHIPS” by Barış Kılınç are published as a

Student Life

At Istanbul 29 Mayıs University, students enjoy a colorful social and cultural atmosphere. On both campuses, academic, social and cultural events go hand in hand. While academic events provide students with the opportunity to increase their knowledge in their fields, social and cultural events provide them with versatile entrepreneurial and organizational skills for their further objectives in lif

Istanbul 29 May University 2017-2018 Graduation Ceremony

Istanbul 29 May University 2017-2018 Academic Year Alumni are making a living.
İstanbul The fifth graduation ceremony of 29 May University will be held at Bağlarbaşı Congress and Culture Center on 01 June 2018. "Ottoman Istanbul" 5th International Symposium Book Published

Istanbul 29 May University and Istanbul Metropolitan Municipality (İBB) organized the V. International Istanbul Ottoman Symposium, a new book was published. Edited by Prof. Dr. Feridun M. Emecen, Prof. Dr. Ali Akyıldız and Assoc. Dr. Emrah Safa Gürkan's work includes the declaration of the symposium which took place between 19-21 May 2017.

Turkish History, Literature, Culture and Art Articles Database is Opened!

The Turkish Historical, Literary, Cultural and Artistic Data Base, which is opened by İSAM Library and Documentation Directorate in its essence, includes articles published in academic publications, especially academic journals, published by various publishing houses and institutions, and symposiums and papers presented in the congress.
There are currently 55,000 bibliographic citations in the da

Multicultural Atmosphere

One-fifth of the students of Istanbul 29 Mayıs University are international students. The university, which offers an opportunity of education in a multicultural and international environment, currently has 154 students from 36 different countries including Afghanistan, Indonesia, Congo, Sudan, Azerbaijan, Turkmenistan and Bosnia and Herzegovina.
